notes: Worker B reviewed EN batch for remaining todo entries first occurring in src/data/tips.ts; source-order slice through the Spirit generated tip block.

entries.gt_45b56d6b2883e6: ATTENTION! Comrade residents, do not open the HERMODOOR during SAMOSBOR.
entries.gt_fcbf5bd0abacb3: The hermodoor locks during samosbor for reasons beyond courtesy. Open it for a voice and you get fog in the shelter; wait for the all-clear.
entries.gt_e24138bc8eb84e: BETONNIK is slow, but extremely tough. Better go around it.
entries.gt_98a33b963d9bab: Betonnik is slow, but extremely tough. A Makarov will only eat cartridges; close the door, go around, or use heavy weapons.
entries.gt_204daa98fbe884: FLASHLIGHT lights dark corridors. Look for one in storage rooms.
entries.gt_f731937806bc91: The flashlight shows the target, but does not stop it. See movement in the light circle - keep distance and a way back.
entries.gt_e239aa777625f4: A person can survive SAMOSBOR with great luck, but nobody has lived a week without WATER.
entries.gt_82280b53cd0588: Water runs out faster than it seems. Without it you run, heal, and take pills worse; bring a bottle before a sortie.
entries.gt_fa4da4fc9c3e07: KNIFE is the first weapon. MAKAROV is the first dream.
entries.gt_1680795efab567: A knife needs no cartridges, but keeps you close to the beast. If you have a Makarov and 9mm, win distance first.
entries.gt_6685a86e24e9a8: After SAMOSBOR, GIGAHRUSH corridors rearrange. Only HERMOBLOCKS stay in place.
entries.gt_1a0f4cfef863bd: After SAMOSBOR, some corridors change. An old route can end at a wall; check the map and hermos again.
entries.gt_78071cb4fbd88f: If you hear the siren, SAMOSBOR has started. Run to the nearest apartment.
entries.gt_58fd5d1744ab24: The siren means bargaining time is over. Run to an apartment, airlock, or room with a hermodoor.
entries.gt_5483af6820698c: CRAWLERS react to vibration. Do not try to outrun them; move quietly.
entries.gt_2f41447fbd248b: Crawlers react to vibration. If you hear scraping ahead, do not run and do not drop metal.
entries.gt_a9f0abd55c3790: Read everything you find: a note can give a stash, debt, bypass, or bad address.
entries.gt_7dc429463d798f: Notes often give a stash, debt, or route. Read an address - check it before the next samosbor.
entries.gt_0f259b8a4da01f: PSI clots spend PSI. Pills, antidepressants, and stabilizers restore the reserve.
entries.gt_29872073e68e59: PSI clots spend PSI. Without reserve they become expensive stones; keep pills or a stabilizer.
entries.gt_a00824d45aa69a: A BANDAGE can stop light bleeding, but serious wounds need a medical kit.
entries.gt_a7a00aee1c73b3: A bandage closes a light wound. If HP dropped hard, look for a medkit or Olga Dmitrievna.
entries.gt_006d5665cbf71d: Do not leave airlock doors open. A closed door is your shield.
entries.gt_8f3a5afdcdfbdc: An open airlock gives enemies and fog a short route. Passed through - close the door behind you.
entries.gt_5490899f8935de: MATKA spawns new beasts. Kill her first.
entries.gt_a1be07a43d186c: Matka breeds beasts while she lives. If you found her room, kill fast or leave before it overfills.
entries.gt_9b6e2e659cd4f2: SHADOW is fast and hidden. Stay alert in dark corridors.
entries.gt_42fa363b99a162: The Shadow is fast and likes dark corners. Keep light between you and it; back off after the lunge.
entries.gt_83d3700117c3db: EYE shoots from far away. Close distance or hide behind cover if you want to live.
entries.gt_d32abb7b965a43: The Eye shoots from far away. A wall, corner, or door breaks line of fire; peek out after the shot.
entries.gt_71caaa45e173ea: DEADMEN are weak alone, but dangerous in groups.
entries.gt_0c1384d256b3a7: A Deadman is weak alone, but a group presses with numbers. Do not stand in doorways without a retreat.
entries.gt_55a48e0d3b8938: SAWED-OFF deals huge damage up close, but is useless at range.
entries.gt_7955533951fbc6: The sawed-off is strong up close. At the far end of a corridor it only makes noise; let them close or switch weapons.
entries.gt_97294f77f55926: NAILGUN is reliable for long narrow corridors.
entries.gt_0137a1bb0d4a18: The nailgun is accurate in a long passage. Ammo is rare, so shoot down the line, not into a pile of legs.
entries.gt_86667c4f2e2be3: Samosbors are more frequent on service floors. Before descending, take water, bandages, and a route to the nearest lift.
entries.gt_2e61a6c0c5021d: Below the Living Zone, samosbors last longer. Without food and water reserves, an expedition quickly becomes a retreat.
entries.gt_f8a22e05db0fe5: People will remember your actions. Think ahead before you pull the trigger.
entries.gt_d4a4019951e5d0: Residents remember threats. Put away your weapon before talking, or trade and jobs will get worse.
entries.gt_e62969d81704c8: CIGARETTES and BOOKS brighten leisure. TOILET PAPER is needed too.
entries.gt_69d336cee5fd40: Cigarettes, books, and toilet paper work as barter. If rubles are short, bring small goods to the storekeeper.
entries.gt_5a4d6c4e46ab2d: APARTMENTS are safe during samosbor if the hermodoor is closed.
entries.gt_1c0ce19b5a3ff4: An apartment with a closed hermo gives a chance to wait out samosbor. An open room without a door is not a shelter.
entries.gt_174be54bd31b8d: SLEEP restores strength. Sleep in a safe place.
entries.gt_2dbe7056c2fae7: Sleep removes fatigue. Sleep only where you can close the door and hear an approach.
entries.gt_10c162c5c54b44: Look for a LIFT to move between floors.
entries.gt_592189538a6caa: A lift can bring you somewhere you did not expect. Before exiting, check the HUD, map, and noise behind the door.
entries.gt_8ccc04bc1c2c03: PHASE SHIFT lets you pass through walls. Do not stand inside a wall when the effect ends.
entries.gt_3caab53bef7360: MARK places a return point. Put it by a shelter, lift, or clean corridor.
entries.gt_77531abe6ba3ef: RECALL pulls you to the PSI mark. A bad mark will not become safe; refresh it after clearing.
entries.gt_51124bfdd00844: CONTROL subdues another mind briefly. While the target is friendly, back off or settle the fight.
entries.gt_f07211eb156604: BRAIN BURN works on weak minds. On a strong target it spends PSI; check the threat level first.
entries.gt_f55f6effe64f1e: Kasha and canned meat fill you better than bread.
entries.gt_56040135ae5752: Kasha and canned meat fill you better than bread. Before a long road, eat dense food; keep bread for bait or trade.
entries.gt_4d9297436ba8e7: Comrades, do not piss on the floor. Use the toilet.
entries.gt_47d60bae1b9ac4: Need rises even during a raid. A bathroom is safer than infected floor; do not wait until combat.
entries.gt_0eee5fc88f775a: Factory workers, the workday begins at 8 a.m. Do not be late for work.
entries.gt_c33a823af6e85a: Machines and production rooms give parts. Arrive with room in your bag, or you will leave a rare component behind.
entries.gt_5a7b21d9fa8d16: Comrade residents, assist the liquidators: better to report than hide a dangerous sample.
entries.gt_93d34cb6a153b7: Liquidators treat hidden threats worse. Found a dangerous sample or corpse - report it before someone reports it for you.
entries.gt_54446cbf16544f: Do not try to hide from a SPIRIT behind walls. Change position, keep UV ready, or leave the narrow passage.
entries.gt_c0ab1b2d5c3696: Spirits pass where a wall does not help. Change position, keep UV ready, or leave the narrow passage.
entries.gt_8a2ec8ccfeb167: Colleagues, under no circumstances approach IDOLS without a task and clearance.
entries.gt_929ec42976ae12: Idols spoil PSI and decisions in your head. Do not stand near them without purpose: take the sample, turn it in, or leave.
entries.gt_ef168281f263c7: Liquidators are the defensive line against samosbor. Service in their ranks rarely ends in a transfer.
entries.gt_934bc171771243: Citizens trade and give jobs more often than they fight. Do not shoot first if you need water or reputation.
entries.gt_9d03046a731331: Most of GIGAHRUSH population is workers, engineers, secretaries, cooks, and neighbors with bad schedules.
entries.gt_0023340ce4fc7d: NII scientists pay for intact samples. A jar without a seal loses value; do not open the sample on the way.
entries.gt_22dd195adf09f2: SCIENTISTS from the NII OF SLIME study samosbors and ways to counter them.
entries.gt_8ff41fd8ea6982: Cultists often hide supplies by altars and kitchens. Take them - expect bad relations and witnesses.
entries.gt_aedd1a75659a68: Wild ones open boxes faster than bureaucrats. If you hear them near a storeroom, decide: trade, fight, or bypass.
entries.gt_e28931ac036f3d: Do not read cult scribble aloud. Chalk on a wall can be a trap; look for an item, door, or tracks.
entries.gt_c17341d127ff3e: After samosbor, flesh, slime, and clots remain. Take only what a quest, the NII, or trade needs.
entries.gt_a265f71b02d430: The latest NII OF SLIME developments are the gauss rifle, plasma gun, and BFG. All three need expensive energy cells.
entries.gt_f7c47a80c36f00: HA ME HA ME HA! If this is not a PSI beam, do not stand in the passage and shame the NII.
entries.gt_17ab6cb12ae518: Strength holds a hit, agility holds tempo, intellect holds PSI. Spend points for the weapon you actually use.
entries.gt_ef08a9b082b77f: Rubles are useful only with a live seller. Water, ammo, and coupons often matter more than money in your pocket.
entries.gt_1446c3fd994e94: Comrades, mind cleanliness: a cleaning kit removes blood, dirt, and some other people's questions.
entries.gt_6ece5faee0be73: A cleaning kit removes blood and dirt. Before inspection or a talk with residents, clean the fight site.
entries.gt_8c7f318efadc10: Comrades, help one another. A neighbor's door is sometimes worth more than a rare cartridge.
entries.gt_0f57b249c42d3c: A neighbor's door can become the nearest hermo. Helped a resident - sometimes you get shelter or a rumor.
entries.gt_875257a44e2735: Assembly is fragile and fast. Do not stand in a straight line; strike quickly and move around the corner.
entries.gt_52d09f94170961: Rebar is tougher than an ordinary beast. Do not go into melee without a heavy weapon.
entries.gt_8801eef4325821: Nightmare holds its shape poorly, but the fight cannot drag. Press with damage and do not give it tempo.
entries.gt_6a333dcf4628eb: A desperate person with a weapon is as dangerous as a monster. Look at the hands first, then choose the conversation.
entries.gt_4cf92876103dfe: Kalashnikov is reliable while there is 7.62. Count bursts, or the outpost will have an empty magazine.
entries.gt_600f183cdaa73d: PPSh eats 9mm in bursts. In a tight corridor it is strength; in an empty magazine, a problem.
entries.gt_f8f19a995090ee: Flamethrower leaves burning trails. Do not retreat through your own fire and do not burn by a door you need.
entries.gt_314876e453259a: Plasma gun spends energy cells fast. Save it for crowds, armor, or a way out of a pinch.
entries.gt_576b2e54ce950a: BFG clears a large area. Step away from the target before firing and do not close your own route.
entries.gt_c764f05c6a891b: Chainsaw is loud and breaks quickly. Save it for what bullets do not take.
entries.gt_4341554d492c6b: Grenade is useful in a cramped room. Throw it - immediately get around a corner or behind a door.
entries.gt_849f225bf024fd: Gauss rifle pierces betonnik. Reload is long, so find cover in advance.
entries.gt_e451a2ffc2a8b4: Holy water heals and restores PSI. Do not spend it on a scratch if the lower floor is ahead.
entries.gt_cae19931354ab2: Jackhammer breaks walls, but charges are few. Pick the wall before the siren, not in smoke.
entries.gt_1cf87400f93dc1: Door kit places one door. A closed passage can buy time during samosbor.
entries.gt_aabcaa8145b370: Block kit seals a passage with a wall. Use it when closing a route is easier than holding a defense.
entries.gt_7b3f4eb512e506: Vacuum clears purple fog in the cell before you. Charge is limited; clean a path, not the whole floor.
entries.gt_92605dfc149b9b: Antidepressant restores PSI. It is reserve for clots, not a reason to enter every fight.
entries.gt_1f0d5a25393a62: Kitchen gives food, rumors, and jobs. While the cook lives, help the kitchen and buy rations early.
entries.gt_0c9189bec0a442: Locksmiths know doors, locks, and pipes. Helped a locksmith - you are more likely to find a key, bypass, or repair.
entries.gt_4cb65d780a6454: The storekeeper sells useful goods and remembers theft. Do not break order if you plan to return.
entries.gt_234ebc44c67391: The doctor heals faster when you arrive in time. Hands tell the story before the heroic report.
entries.gt_365228e13980f9: Directors and chiefs know codes, lists, and bypasses. Ask carefully: they remember interest.
entries.gt_6f71545cf97b99: A pilgrim is not always an enemy. But faith does not replace water, cartridges, and a closed door.
entries.gt_788c1408fabf6a: Liquidator hunters patrol passages. Helped them - get cartridges, a debt, or a safe rumor.
entries.gt_5c0f3fd20d6fbb: Killing an unarmed citizen hurts reputation. Later they will not open a door or sell you water.
entries.gt_dcd28c68ebf25c: Factions decide access to trade, shelter, and the first shot. Watch relations before a fight.
entries.gt_1147b90451840a: Killing a faction member worsens relations with the whole faction. If the fight is inevitable, pick a place without witnesses.
entries.gt_bc53594a44fc2a: Yakov Davidovich accepts samples by protocol. Do not open the jar, do not wet the seal, and record your pulse after contact in the experiment log.
entries.gt_fd874a99b98f2a: Major Gromny holds the lower checkpoints. His pipe signals mean retreat, wounded, or fight; listen until the second signal.
entries.gt_73d1dac5bd1d21: A dropped tool can break or disappear. After a fight, pick yours up before moving to another floor.
entries.gt_20cdedee3b7fa7: A rumor about an exit without a return route is dangerous. Check the path with light, map, and water reserve.
entries.gt_7f1e642a5ae7af: Floors can get confused after a lift and samosbor. Keep a map, water, and a route back.
entries.gt_4f65366deb5293: Samosbor is not an earthquake: it changes passages and calls with voices. Do not answer, close the hermo.
entries.gt_a921966dd98ad7: If a neighbor went for water and did not return, his route may have changed. Do not repeat it without a map and reserve.
entries.gt_b4f98aae050424: Scraping in the wall usually means a threat, not a stash. Close the door and go around.
entries.gt_75eb33df237329: Some beasts come out of walls near the player. Do not stand close to a suspicious surface.
entries.gt_2e8dc4063660d7: PSI strike is cheap and fast. Use it when you need to stagger a weak target and save cartridges.
entries.gt_f3a2ca5d040df5: Rupture hits an area. Do not stand near the target and check where allies are.
entries.gt_5aab0fa3cf8b91: PSI storm is expensive. Save it for a crowd, not one deadman.
entries.gt_56c28d27a5bff6: Madness makes a beast attack its own. After using it, watch from behind a door, not from the middle of the room.
entries.gt_7309e4bd5ff242: Collectors are damp and dark; sound travels far there. Do not make noise without reason and keep a dry route.
entries.gt_b555a2aae97f00: [DATA DELETED]: Samosbor almost never ends. Go only with water, a filter, and retreat reserve.
entries.gt_5be389108e6780: [DELETED] is not outside. Documents and doors often do not match there; check the pass and the actual passage.
entries.gt_d3a264f15ed1d5: [DELETED] shoots from far away with stalked eyes. Break line of fire and do not run straight.
entries.gt_004c084dedfd0b: [DELETED] promises an exit. In GIGAHRUSH, an exit is checked by a return route, water, and cartridges.
entries.gt_69589cde673bd7: [DATA DELETED]: before a sortie, check water, bandage, filter, and the door back.
entries.gt_28db5158966b09: heard as wire cracking and tiny steps
entries.gt_ff2e26d144c77c: meet it in a wide spot, stop it with the first cheap shot, and back around a corner
entries.gt_8354650b551f54: do not stand in a doorway with an empty magazine
entries.gt_089e5bce869037: after the fight, check wire and electrical tape, but first make sure the pack is finished
entries.gt_1fc4b79c3227f9: scratches panels and keeps to walls
entries.gt_256342da368dc3: draw it to the center of the room, do not hug the wall, and hit before the second lunge
entries.gt_09455019247101: do not consider a wall safe if you hear scraping nearby
entries.gt_9287586287b6b8: tracks by the panel often show where it came out
entries.gt_bed2d227c2aee9: drags wet sound across the floor
entries.gt_32a7fbc94fe60e: walk quietly, keep distance, and do not drop metal before a door
entries.gt_c1ca3c021481cb: running down a corridor calls it better than any bait
entries.gt_6155cf62f30ed8: after the crawler, check wet corners and the bathroom; someone else's cargo often lies there
entries.gt_da3eadd9b61c0b: walks slowly and does not ask a door for permission
entries.gt_63c53ff64bb99c: close the passage, go around, or strike with heavy weapons and gauss
entries.gt_1c3810b289f035: Makarov against betonnik usually spends cartridges more than it settles the fight
entries.gt_d7372855c8559d: near betonnik, look not for a trophy but for a route you can leave by
entries.gt_0c5922d16e870e: makes body noise and walks straight
entries.gt_d7e4497a446afb: keep a line of retreat, hit them one by one, and do not let the crowd clog the door
entries.gt_c5c2e04075670e: one deadman is weak, but three turn a passage into a crush
entries.gt_ab46c5982fed63: check deadmen pockets after silence, not between blows
entries.gt_6b3e3c00314288: keeps distance and shoots in a straight line
entries.gt_d23318386b7c2b: break line of fire with a door, corner, or wall, and answer after the shot
entries.gt_7737c6f76a5f17: running down a long corridor makes you a target
entries.gt_59d230956f91f7: after the eye, closing the corner at once is more useful than staring at the corpse
entries.gt_ed65a511c9071a: holds its shape poorly and presses tempo
entries.gt_305021e4cc3a9c: hit hard, do not drag it out, and do not give it the center of the room
entries.gt_7ec39aeab26a31: a long fight with a nightmare almost always gets worse
entries.gt_ee866ec5d86b9c: after the nightmare, check PSI and bandages before the next door
entries.gt_c40185fcea3793: moves from dark corner to dark corner
entries.gt_5eacefe65bf2d6: keep light between you and it, back off after the lunge, and do not give it your back
entries.gt_e9870b392c7113: chasing a shadow without a flashlight ends with a side hit
entries.gt_93edeafcb38877: after the shadow, check lamps and batteries; it often breaks the route
entries.gt_aceb0b3935b614: rings with iron and holds a hit better than an assembly
entries.gt_1fb8411d67c49c: do not go at it with a knife; use shot, heavy melee, or distance
entries.gt_c2c7d9cb98ecdf: a short fight against rebar only works with HP reserve
entries.gt_4cdbd900ce1d77: if you survived, metal, nails, or repair scrap are often nearby
entries.gt_757799f9711fa4: keeps the room alive while she lives
entries.gt_619c65166e1e9f: kill her first, or the fight becomes production of new beasts
entries.gt_f6f93caf688b7b: clearing small things around matka without a plan means feeding the timer
entries.gt_8c0eaeaaa54d2a: after matka, do not stand in the room: check entrances and reload
entries.gt_9dbc0a025cca99: stands still and spoils PSI around itself
entries.gt_51030d04e56ef7: enter with a purpose: take a sample, complete a task, or leave
entries.gt_bac54c16b827f6: standing near an idol without business is bad for your head and route
entries.gt_89faafb126f816: treat any item by an idol as evidence first, then goods
entries.gt_9a0da3002156fe: controls the fight through other bodies
entries.gt_398405f024f720: break command lines, remove small threats, and hit the controller when there is an opening
entries.gt_e9d63c67c91ad5: shooting only at the crowd means leaving the reason for the crowd alive
entries.gt_1f0bdc0131655a: after mancobus, check nearby rooms; part of the threat may have come from there
entries.gt_ac4e8040fca467: hits from far away and reads a straight passage
entries.gt_084742b67b4fa3: close line of fire, change angle, and do not run on one axis
entries.gt_934768c410144e: a ranged enemy is not obliged to walk up to your sawed-off
entries.gt_193d9ece503944: if the herald stood at the zone edge, check the nearest bypass
entries.gt_88644f2fbdeb41: passes where a door does not help
entries.gt_1dd0a57ab6cbe1: change position, keep UV ready, or leave the narrow passage
entries.gt_f6d8299b0e2369: a closed door against a spirit gives seconds, not safety
entries.gt_42591385bbeb56: after the spirit, checking PSI and the way back matters more than checking the wall
